base_models.resolution_note: The immutable revisions below are user-attested download-time pins: the researcher confirms both Chat bases were downloaded on 2026-07-14 before QLoRA setup and fine-tuning. The Hugging Face main references were re-queried on 2026-07-19. Archived run manifests record local cache paths rather than remote IDs or revisions, so this attestation improves historical retrieval traceability without constituting an independently logged runtime snapshot.

sailor_7b.attestation_scope: The researcher confirms Sailor-7B-Chat was downloaded before setup and QLoRA fine-tuning. The archived adapter and run manifests record only /root/hf_cache/models/Sailor-7B.

vistral_7b_chat.attestation_scope: The researcher confirms Vistral-7B-Chat was downloaded before setup and QLoRA fine-tuning. The archived adapter and run manifests record only /root/hf_cache/models/Vistral-7B-Chat.

visobert.tokenizer: SentencePiece tokenizer resolved from the same pinned model revision

external_model_archives.access: Model archives may be temporarily public for audit; repository visibility is controlled by the owner and must be checked at the pinned revision below.

encoder_checkpoints.contents: PhoBERT, XLM-R, registered ablation, and low-resource checkpoints with histories and run manifests.
encoder_checkpoints.verification_note: Public metadata and file hierarchy were inspected on 2026-07-18. The repository contains encoder, ablation, and low-resource run directories; weights remain external to Git.

archive_verification.limitation: This archive verifies checkpoint/run availability, not the original base-model revisions for the separate 7B QLoRA systems.

sailor_7b_qlora.contents: Sailor-7B QLoRA adapters and run metadata.
sailor_7b_qlora.verification_note: Public metadata and file hierarchy were inspected on 2026-07-18. The repository exposes adapter and per-seed archive directories.

verified_scope: three adapter weight LFS SHA-256 identifiers
historical_run_archive.interpretation: The archived adapters and per-seed runs are traceable. The immutable Sailor-7B-Chat revision is supplied by documented user attestation of the pre-fine-tuning download, while the archive itself does not independently log the remote revision or a frozen software environment.

vistral_7b_qlora.contents: Vistral-7B QLoRA adapters and run metadata.
vistral_7b_qlora.verification_note: Public metadata and file hierarchy were inspected on 2026-07-18. The repository exposes adapter and per-seed archive directories.

verified_scope: three adapter weight LFS SHA-256 identifiers
historical_run_archive.interpretation: The archived adapters and per-seed runs are traceable. The immutable Vistral-7B-Chat revision is supplied by documented user attestation of the pre-fine-tuning download, while the archive itself does not independently log the remote revision or a frozen software environment.

access_notes: No access token, secret, raw checkpoint, or adapter weight is committed to this repository.
Pinned Hugging Face revisions identify the externally stored checkpoints and adapters without committing weights or credentials.
Raw social-media text remains subject to the repository's data-governance and source-permission terms.
